message:
feat(evidence): diff strategy evidence ledger with ring buffer (bd-3jlw5.3)

Adds DiffEvidenceLedger with:
- DiffStrategyRecord, Observation, RegimeTransition record types
- Fixed-capacity ring buffer (default 10K) for zero per-frame allocation
- Automatic regime transition detection on record()
- JSONL export and EvidenceSink integration
- DiffRegime enum: StableFrame, BurstyChange, ResizeRegime, DegradedTerminal
- 20 unit tests including 1000-frame simulation

Unblocks bd-1lgz8.1 (galaxy-brain widget) and bd-3jlw5.6 (decision contract).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
